seo.title: Entities
seo.description: Entity layer patterns: presentation components, data models, and entity-level business logic organization

header.title: Business Domain (Entities)
header.description: Entities are the core business units of the project. This section describes the unified structure of any entity based on strict architectural rules.

tree.title: File Structure
tree.description: Each business entity inside <one>src/entities/*</one> must follow a strict directory structure for logic and UI isolation.

modules.title: Standard Entity Modules
modules.description: A complete entity consists of these required modules:
